name: Explaining Reinforcement Learning Agents via Inductive Logic Programming
summary: arXiv:2607.13655v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Explainable Reinforcement Learning (XRL) seeks to make Reinforcement Learning (RL) policies more transparent and interpretable, a key requirement in...
description: arXiv:2607.13655v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Explainable Reinforcement Learning (XRL) seeks to make Reinforcement Learning (RL) policies more transparent and interpretable, a key requirement in safety-critical and human-centric scenarios. However, it is mostly based on user studies, thus targeting the needs of a specific audience and lacking shared evaluation metrics. On the other hand, logi...
author: Celeste Veronese, Edoardo Zorzi, Daniele Meli, Alessandro Farinelli
